entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The agricultural crop from which the straw is derived and for which the soils are characteristic

entities.name: RICE STRAW
entities.description: Organic residue from rice plants applied at a concentration of 0.15% to study its effect on nitrogen

entities.name: FLOODED TROPICAL RICE SOILS
entities.description: Three types of tropical soils under flooded conditions used for the experiment

entities.name: MINERALISATION
entities.description: The biological process of converting organic nitrogen into inorganic forms

entities.name: SOIL NITROGEN
entities.description: The nitrogen content naturally occurring within the soil

entities.name: FERTILIZER NITROGEN
entities.description: The nitrogen added to the soil through fertilizer application

entities.name: INCUBATION
entities.description: A laboratory-controlled process lasting 8 weeks to observe nitrogen transformations
